message:
fix(db): add layered SQLite health probes with retry-on-corruption and STORAGE_ROOT recovery

Overhaul the SQLite initialization and health check pipeline to be more
resilient against corruption detected during startup:

Initialization refactor:
- Extract inline initialization closure into run_sqlite_init_once() for
  clarity and reusability
- Add initialize_sqlite_file_once() wrapper that implements a two-phase
  retry strategy: attempt init → on retryable error (corruption, OOM),
  run health probes → if unhealthy, recover_sqlite_file() → retry init
- Add should_retry_sqlite_init_error() to classify which SqlErrors
  warrant a recovery attempt vs immediate failure

Layered health probes (sqlite_file_is_healthy):
- Phase 1: PRAGMA quick_check (existing, fast page-level check)
- Phase 2: PRAGMA integrity_check(1) (new, single-page deep check that
  catches B-tree structural issues quick_check can miss)
- Phase 3: Schema-aware query smoke test (new) - exercises a real query
  against message_recipients joined with messages to detect FTS/index
  corruption that PRAGMA checks miss. Gracefully skips on legacy schemas
  missing the required columns.
- Extract sqlite_pragma_check_is_ok() to deduplicate PRAGMA parsing

Recovery improvements:
- Add recover_sqlite_file() that checks STORAGE_ROOT environment variable
  for archive-based recovery before falling back to sibling backup search
- Rename ensure_sqlite_file_healthy callers to use recover_sqlite_file()
  for the startup/integrity paths (ensure_sqlite_file_healthy remains as
  the core recovery implementation)
- Update error messages and log warnings to say "health probes" instead
  of "quick_check" to reflect the layered approach

Also update Cargo.lock to reflect fsqlite-vfs version bump from 0.1.1
to 0.1.2 across all dependent crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2135,7 +2135,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fsqlite-ext-json",
  "fsqlite-ext-rtree",
  "fsqlite-types",
- "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.1",
+ "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.2",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -2197,7 +2197,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fsqlite-planner 0.1.1",
  "fsqlite-types",
  "fsqlite-vdbe 0.1.1",
- "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.1",
+ "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.2",
  "fsqlite-wal 0.1.1",
  "serde",
  "tracing",
@@ -2345,7 +2345,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "chacha20poly1305",
  "fsqlite-error",
  "fsqlite-types",
- "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.1",
+ "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.2",
  "parking_lot",
  "xxhash-rust",
 ]
@@ -2468,7 +2468,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "fsqlite-vfs"
-version = "0.1.1"
+version = "0.1.2"
 dependencies = [
  "advisory-lock",
  "fsqlite-error",
@@ -2505,7 +2505,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "crc32c",
  "fsqlite-error",
  "fsqlite-types",
- "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.1",
+ "fsqlite-vfs 0.1.2",
  "tracing",
  "xxhash-rust",
 ]
